exercises.sentence: Yo __________ que la respuesta es correcta.
exercises.translation: I know that the answer is correct.

exercises.sentence: No __________ por qué no ha llegado todavía.
exercises.translation: I don't know why he hasn't arrived yet.

exercises.sentence: Yo __________ usar este programa de computadora.
exercises.translation: I know how to use this computer program.

exercises.sentence: Ayer yo __________ la verdad sobre el accidente.
exercises.translation: Yesterday I found out the truth about the accident.

exercises.sentence: En ese momento, yo __________ que todo iba a estar bien.
exercises.translation: At that moment, I realized that everything was going to be fine.

exercises.sentence: Por fin __________ el secreto de mi abuela.
exercises.translation: Finally I found out my grandmother's secret.

exercises.sentence: Antes yo __________ hablar un poco de francés.
exercises.translation: I used to know how to speak a little French.

exercises.sentence: Yo __________ que él vendría a la fiesta.
exercises.translation: I knew that he would come to the party.
I always knew where to find my keys.

exercises.sentence: Yo __________ qué hacer si hubiera una emergencia.
exercises.translation: I would know what to do if there were an emergency.

exercises.sentence: Si estudiara más, yo __________ todas las respuestas.
exercises.translation: If I studied more, I would know all the answers.

exercises.sentence: Yo __________ apreciar tu ayuda si me la ofrecieras.
exercises.translation: I would know how to appreciate your help if you offered it to me.

exercises.sentence: Mañana yo __________ los resultados del examen.
exercises.translation: Tomorrow I will know the results of the exam.
Soon I will know who won the competition.

exercises.sentence: Algún día __________ toda la verdad sobre este asunto.
exercises.translation: Someday I will know the whole truth about this matter.
